title: Travelling Salesman (Exact)
description: Line 1: integer n (number of cities). Next n lines: an n x n symmetric distance matrix (space-separated). Print the minimum cost of a tour that starts at city 0, visits every city exactly once, and returns to city 0. (Held-Karp DP — exponential in n.)

examples.explanation: The cheapest route from city 0 visiting every city once and returning costs 80.
The cheapest route from city 0 visiting every city once and returning costs 0.
